song.title: Hear Now, the Lord is Calling !
song.lyrics:
[V1] Hear now, the Lord is calling!
Who will arise? The dawning
Of His appearing and His kingdom draws near.
Though now for just a while we’re suff’ring,
Then it will seem as nothing,
When in the glory of our Lord we appear.
[V2] Though Hades’ gates oppose us,
We know the Lord is for us,
As we proclaim to all, “The kingdom has come!”
We call all men unto repentance;
Flee sin, and live for Christ hence!
Seek first the kingdom
And the Master’s, “Well done!”
[V3] On then, and into glory;
Rise, tell the gospel story!
Tell how the Lord is coming; soon He shall reign.
All the darkness will be defeated,
Christ on His throne be seated,
With all the saints who’ve loved Him
And His dear Name.
